name: Hellsweeper VR
short_description: DARE TO DESCEND INTO HELL? Hellsweeper VR is an intense first-person action-combat VR experience. Traverse the underworld where every step brings a challenge or a chance. Gain mastery of your weapons and elemental magic, or fall to the unrelenting onslaught of hell's twisted souls.
detailed_description:
Digital Deluxe Edition

🔥 Hellsweeper VR

🔥 Mystic Hellhound

🔥 HellSweeper VR Art Book

🔥 Hellsweeper VR Soundtrack


About the Game

DARE TO DESCEND INTO HELL?

From the makers of Sairento VR comes a first person action-combat game that descends you into hell. In Hellsweeper VR you traverse the demonic dimensions, wield weapons with deadly precision, command the forces of telekinesis and muster mystical powers to wipe out your twisted enemies. Reap your rewards, upgrade your skills, and choose your fate as you experiment with unique combat variations and start to discover what being a Hellsweeper means to you.

  • INTENSE LIMITLESS MOVEMENT
    A daring, no-holes-barred locomotion system that pushes the limits of even the bravest of VR players.

  • MASTER YOUR COMBAT STYLE
    Summon, wield & master various weapons and magic combinations.

  • SURVIVE IN VARIOUS GAME MODES
    Various singleplayer modes and 3-player co-op mode. Survive together, Die together.

  • CONTENT RICH WITH HIGH REPLAYABILITY
    Conquer 18 maps, over 10 enemy types with elemental variants and multiple mission types, offering a unique gameplay experience with every run.

Remember to follow us on our Discord channel or Twitter to get updated on our latest developments!

English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
